en: This will return a list of all the groups currently registered by PermissionsEx.
Can be used with:
Delete - deletes all groups registered by PermissionsEx, I personally wouldn't suggest using this
converts a player to a PermissionUser
converts a string to a permission group
This is the player based entity in PermissionsEx, for example me, Cheatchki
This will return a list of all the PermissionUsers registered by PermissionsEx.
Can be used with:
Delete - deletes all users registered by PEX, I personally wouldn't suggest ever using this
returns the name of the permission entity
Returns a list of all the permissions a entity has (this does include the permissions it inherits from its parents)
can be used with:
Add - adds a permission to a user
Remove - removes a permission a user
This is the base of the addon, it is impossible to define something as a pex entity, BUT whereever you see it (in the documentation) you are able to feed it a permission group OR a permission user
Returns the rank of a group (used in rank-ladders)
can be used with:
set - sets the rank of a group to specified number
delete - sets the rank of a group to 0
Returns the prefix of a pex entity as defined in the PermissionsEx permission.yml file
Can be used with:
set - sets the prefix to the given string
delete - removes the prefix
Returns the suffix of a permission entity as defined in PermissionsEx permissions.yml
can be used with:
set - sets the prefix to the given string
delete - removes the prefix
This will return the current default group in the PermissionsEx file, if a world is specified then it will return the default group of that world
Can be used with:
Set - sets the default group
Returns a list of all the entities parents/groups
Can be used with:
add - adds specified permission group to the entities parents
remove - removes specified permission group to the entities parents
Returns a list of permission users that are in a group
can be used with:
add - adds the group to the specified user
remove - remove the group grom the specified user
Returns the weight of a given group
Can be used with:
set - sets the weight to specified number
delete - sets the weight to 0
this is the group based entity from PermissionsEx, for example Admin  is a fairly common group
If you want to be able to create a user/group from skript, then you will have to use this at some point or else, the entity will not be saved to the config
